query:
SELECT 'jigsawExpertGroups' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM jigsawExpertGroups
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsawExpertMembers', COUNT(*) FROM jigsawExpertMembers
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsawHomeGroups', COUNT(*) FROM jigsawHomeGroups
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsawHomeMembers', COUNT(*) FROM jigsawHomeMembers
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsawTopics', COUNT(*) FROM jigsawTopics;
